description:
#barcelonavlog  #solotraveler #Travelvlog
MY FIRST TIME TRAVELLING TO BARCELONA, SPAIN 🇪🇸(7-Day Solo Travel Vlog)
I took on Spain solo for 7 days, and let me tell you—it was EVERYTHING! From exploring the charming streets of Barcelona to indulging in the best tapas, getting lost (in the best way), and living my main character moment, this trip was one for the books. 💃🏽✨

Come along as I take you through all the highlights, hidden gems, and unforgettable moments of my solo travel adventure. Meeting new people even getting my hair braided!!???  If you’re thinking about taking your own solo trip (or just want to travel through me 😉), you’re in the right place!

🔗 Grab my Ultimate Spain Travel Guide here: https://princessuche.com/shop/049c31fb-89b5-41ea-885c-65e323225573

Links to Hotels I stayed in:
Do Placa Reial Hotel- https://expedia.com/affiliate/x4X5dH6
Sonder Los Acros - https://expedia.com/affiliate/c759vWt
https://princessuche.com/

Connect with me
TIKTOK -   / https://www.tiktok.com/@cessuche
INSTAGRAM-   / https://www.instagram.com/cessuche
